{{Quote|Let's cut to the chase. I've got six team members to fly out of here.|Thella|<ref name="FF" />}}
'''Thella''' was a [[Human/Legends|Human]] [[Gender/Legends|female]] and the leader of a [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebel Alliance]] [[Infiltrators/Legends|Infiltrator]] team.

==Biography==
She led her six team members on a mission to [[Kelada/Legends|Kelada]] to steal the sector fleet plans. While they successfully extracted the encrypted information, their activity was detected by the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Imperials]], and one of her team members was injured during the escape. The further Imperials responded by locking down Thella's transport with two squads of [[Stormtrooper/Legends|stormtroopers]], and scouring the [[Spaceport/Legends|starport]] for her team members.

After all the trouble her team had gone through, Thella was determined to find a way off [[Planet/Legends|planet]]. She heard of a local [[Information broker/Legends|infochant]] known as "The Finder" whom she hoped could aid them. While the rest of her team laid low in a hiding place, Thella took her first officer [[Huffreys]], and approached the infochant in the renowned [[Cantina/Legends|cantina]], [[Lorana's Labyrinth]]. The infochant was actually a [[Twi'lek/Legends|Twi'lek]] called [[Loh'khar]], and to Thella's surprise, he already knew her predicament. In exchange for a copy of the data she had acquired, Loh'khar provided her with an [[MD-series medical droid/Legends|Emdee medical droid]], a decrypt unit for the coded information, and put her in contact with the [[Smuggler/Legends|smuggler]] [[Platt Okeefe/Legends|Platt Okeefe]] who owed him a favor. Okeefe flew Thella and her team through the Imperial blockade of Kelada and onto the backwater planet [[Gelgelar/Legends|Gelgelar]] in her ship the [[Last Chance (YT-1300 light freighter)/Legends|''Last Chance'']].
